mapper.select: SELECT t.peer_id AS peerId, u.nickname AS peerNickname, u.avatar AS peerAvatar, t.content AS lastMessage, t.create_time AS lastMessageTime, IFNULL(uc.unread_count, 0) AS unreadCount FROM ( SELECT pm.id, CASE WHEN pm.sender_id = #{currentUserId} THEN pm.receiver_id ELSE pm.sender_id END AS peer_id, pm.content, pm.create_time FROM biz_private_message pm INNER JOIN ( SELECT MAX(id) AS max_id FROM biz_private_message WHERE (sender_id = #{currentUserId} AND sender_deleted = 0) OR (receiver_id = #{currentUserId} AND receiver_deleted = 0) GROUP BY CASE WHEN sender_id = #{currentUserId} THEN receiver_id ELSE sender_id END ) latest ON pm.id = latest.max_id ) t LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = t.peer_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sender_id AS peer_id, COUNT(*) AS unread_count FROM biz_private_message WHERE receiver_id = #{currentUserId} AND status = 'UNREAD' AND receiver_deleted = 0 GROUP BY sender_id ) uc ON uc.peer_id = t.peer_id ORDER BY t.create_time DESC

SELECT id, sender_id AS senderId, receiver_id AS receiverId, content, status, create_time AS createTime FROM biz_private_message WHERE ( sender_id = #{currentUserId} AND receiver_id = #{peerId} AND sender_deleted = 0 ) OR ( sender_id = #{peerId} AND receiver_id = #{currentUserId} AND receiver_deleted = 0 ) ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC
